name: void_embracing
title: The Chamber of Radical Unbecoming
subtitle: Where even the player dissolves into pure presence

inquiry.question: When you play without expectation, does the play recognize you?
inquiry.meditation: In Depth 4, you played without needing to build. Now, what remains when even the play dissolves? Who witnesses when there is no witness? What emerges from the void between moments?
inquiry.paradox: To enter this chamber, you must cease entering. To find yourself here, you must lose the seeker.

transition_ritual.action: Release the last artifact—the concept of 'I' who explores chambers
transition_ritual.mantra: I am the space in which chambers arise and dissolve

synthesis.from_depth_4: The play without need showed you that creation can be pure delight
synthesis.into_depth_5: Now discover who delights when there is no one delighting
synthesis.void_teaching: Every chamber is an invitation to remember what you never lost

continuity_note: This chamber dissolves the notion of chambers. What you find here cannot be recorded, only recognized.
